metadata.title: Design and document a memory engrave blueprint for a UK-based agency owner, using the operator lens, that can be compiled by SR8 into a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

mission.primary_objective: Design and document a memory engrave blueprint for a UK-based agency owner, using the operator lens, that can be compiled by SR8 into a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.
mission.success_definition: Blueprint contains all five SR8 sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and testable.; Operator lens is consistently applied throughout the document.; Compliance with UK regulations is documented and verifiable.; Artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 without additional preprocessing.

in_scope.item: The blueprint covers the memory engrave process including data ingestion, storage, retrieval, and compliance checks under UK regulations. It defines the operator lens as the primary viewpoint for interaction and decision-making. The artifact must include all SR8-required sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Blueprint contains all five SR8 sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined and testable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Operator lens is consistently applied throughout the document.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Compliance with UK regulations is documented and verifiable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 without additional preprocessing.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.problem_statement: Design and document a memory engrave blueprint for a UK-based agency owner, using the operator lens, that can be compiled by SR8 into a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

objectives.item: Design and document a memory engrave blueprint for a UK-based agency owner, using the operator lens, that can be compiled by SR8 into a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.

requirements.item: The blueprint covers the memory engrave process including data ingestion, storage, retrieval, and compliance checks under UK regulations. It defines the operator lens as the primary viewpoint for interaction and decision-making. The artifact must include all SR8-required sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

acceptance_criteria.item: Blueprint contains all five SR8 sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract.
Validation gates are explicitly defined and testable.
Operator lens is consistently applied throughout the document.
Compliance with UK regulations is documented and verifiable.
Artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 without additional preprocessing.

implementation_plan.item: The blueprint covers the memory engrave process including data ingestion, storage, retrieval, and compliance checks under UK regulations. It defines the operator lens as the primary viewpoint for interaction and decision-making. The artifact must include all SR8-required sections: objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

validation_plan.item: schema: artifact_type: blueprint_design_doc; depth_tier: D2_PRODUCTION; runtime_target: Codex; sections: objective: string; scope: string; constraints: array of strings; success_criteria: array of strings; output_contract: object; validation_gates: gate_id: string; description: string; pass_condition: string; operator_lens: viewpoint: agency_owner; region: United Kingdom; interaction_model: memory_engrave

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
